title: python: add strict generic type arguments in node.py
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-42j7, mypy on python/src/lichen/node.py no longer reported the Meshtastic import or start/stop attr-defined errors, but still failed under strict mode on unrelated missing type arguments for asyncio.Task and dict/list return/update types in node.py. What needs to be done: add precise generic annotations for the Node task fields/returns and status/config/neighbor dictionaries, then rerun mypy on node.py without suppressions.
close_reason: Completed: added strict generic annotations for node.py asyncio Task fields/returns and status/config/neighbor dictionary shapes, with casts preserving existing int(...) config conversions. Tests/checks: uv run python -m ruff check src/lichen/node.py; uv run python -m mypy src/lichen/node.py; uv run python -m pytest tests/test_node.py; git diff --check. Review pass 1: no findings; diff is annotation-only behavior-preserving cleanup. Review pass 2: no findings.
